StepAction: Explorer idle with current folder, selected set, and pending clipboard state visible.
Condition: user chooses a file operation or pop-out action

StepAction: Collect target path, selected set, action kind, and required user confirmation or input.
Validate schema, basename, confirmation, conflict, boundary, and destination preflight requirements.
Condition: request accepted or rejected with stable error code

StepAction: Perform active-project mutation, upload, download preparation, recyclebin move, restore, or approved destination operation.
Refresh affected directories, reconcile tabs or panes, and show success feedback.
Show explicit rejection reason and leave filesystem unchanged.
Condition: error is displayed and user returns to explorer
